strategy_snapshot.topology: AI Compute Clusters -> Backend/Frontend Networking (Tomahawk/Jericho) -> Custom ASIC (XPUs) -> VMWare Cloud Foundation
strategy_snapshot.primary_vector: Custom ASIC Dominance (Google TPU, Meta MTIA) + VMWare FCF Accretion
strategy_snapshot.fragile_point: Hyperscaler in-house silicon disintermediation vs VMWare churn rate
strategy_snapshot.core_thesis: Broadcom acts as the 'Interconnect Tax' collector; networking complexity scales non-linearly with cluster size.

stop_loss_rules.fundamental_melt_down: Loss of major ASIC customer or VMWare operating margins < 50%
